'''√j-zh-f''' ('''jazhafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umbecast|umbecast]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umbecast|umbecast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √j-zh-f
|-
! Lemma
| jazhafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jazhafithi|jazhafithi]] || [[word:jazhafiji|jazhafiji]] || [[word:jazhafishi|jazhafishi]] || [[word:jazhafi|jazhafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazhafuthuth|jazhafuthuth]] || [[word:jazhafujuj|jazhafujuj]] || [[word:jazhafushush|jazhafushush]] || [[word:jazhaf|jazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazhafuthu|jazhafuthu]] || [[word:jazhafuju|jazhafuju]] || [[word:jazhafushu|jazhafushu]] || [[word:jazhafu|jazhafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazhafufuth|jazhafufuth]] || [[word:jazhafufuj|jazhafufuj]] || [[word:jazhafufush|jazhafufush]] || [[word:jazhafuf|jazhafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jazhafethe|jazhafethe]] || [[word:jazhafeje|jazhafeje]] || [[word:jazhafeshe|jazhafeshe]] || [[word:jazhafe|jazhafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazhafothoth|jazhafothoth]] || [[word:jazhafojoj|jazhafojoj]] || [[word:jazhafoshosh|jazhafoshosh]] || [[word:jazhaf|jazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazhafotho|jazhafotho]] || [[word:jazhafojo|jazhafojo]] || [[word:jazhafosho|jazhafosho]] || [[word:jazhafo|jazhafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazhafofoth|jazhafofoth]] || [[word:jazhafofoj|jazhafofoj]] || [[word:jazhafofosh|jazhafofosh]] || [[word:jazhafof|jazhafof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jazhafïf|jazhafïf]] || [[word:jazhafïf|jazhafïf]] || [[word:jazhafïf|jazhafïf]] || [[word:jazhafïf|jazhafïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazhafïfïf|jazhafïfïf]] || [[word:jazhafïfïf|jazhafïfïf]] || [[word:jazhafïfïf|jazhafïfïf]] || [[word:jazhafïfïf|jazhafïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazhafïf|jazhafïf]] || [[word:jazhafïf|jazhafïf]] || [[word:jazhafïf|jazhafïf]] || [[word:jazhafïf|jazhafïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazhafïf|jazhafïf]] || [[word:jazhafïf|jazhafïf]] || [[word:jazhafïf|jazhafïf]] || [[word:jazhafïf|jazhafïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jazhafæthæ|jazhafæthæ]] || [[word:jazhafæjæ|jazhafæjæ]] || [[word:jazhafæshæ|jazhafæshæ]] || [[word:jazhafæ|jazhafæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazhafathath|jazhafathath]] || [[word:jazhafajaj|jazhafajaj]] || [[word:jazhafashash|jazhafashash]] || [[word:jazhaf|jazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazhafatha|jazhafatha]] || [[word:jazhafaja|jazhafaja]] || [[word:jazhafasha|jazhafasha]] || [[word:jazhafa|jazhafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazhafafath|jazhafafath]] || [[word:jazhafafaj|jazhafafaj]] || [[word:jazhafafash|jazhafafash]] || [[word:jazhafaf|jazhafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jazhafasha|jazhafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojazhafasha|gojazhafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijazhafasha|gokijazhafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jazhafnüsha|jazhafnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojazhafnknüsha|gojazhafnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijazhafnüsha|gokijazhafnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jazhafshësha|jazhafshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojazhafnkshësha|gojazhafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijazhafshësha|gokijazhafshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jazhafrosha|jazhafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojazhafnkrosha|gojazhafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijazhafrosha|gokijazhafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jazhafmusha|jazhafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojazhafnkmusha|gojazhafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazhafmusha|gokijazhafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jazhafsherasha|jazhafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojazhafnksherasha|gojazhafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijazhafsherasha|gokijazhafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jazhafngasha|jazhafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojazhafnkngasha|gojazhafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijazhafngasha|gokijazhafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jazhafyasha|jazhafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojazhafnkyasha|gojazhafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijazhafyasha|gokijazhafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jazhafyamasha|jazhafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojazhafnkyamasha|gojazhafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijazhafyamasha|gokijazhafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jazhafnüshësha|jazhafnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojazhafnknüshësha|gojazhafnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijazhafnüshësha|gokijazhafnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jazhafnürosha|jazhafnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojazhafnknürosha|gojazhafnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijazhafnürosha|gokijazhafnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazhafnümusha|jazhafnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojazhafnknümusha|gojazhafnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazhafnümusha|gokijazhafnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jazhafshënüsha|jazhafshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojazhafnkshënüsha|gojazhafnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijazhafshënüsha|gokijazhafshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jazhafshërosha|jazhafshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojazhafnkshërosha|gojazhafnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijazhafshërosha|gokijazhafshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazhafshëmusha|jazhafshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojazhafnkshëmusha|gojazhafnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazhafshëmusha|gokijazhafshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jazhafronüsha|jazhafronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojazhafnkronüsha|gojazhafnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijazhafronüsha|gokijazhafronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jazhafroshësha|jazhafroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojazhafnkroshësha|gojazhafnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijazhafroshësha|gokijazhafroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazhafromusha|jazhafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojazhafnkromusha|gojazhafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazhafromusha|gokijazhafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jazhafmunüsha|jazhafmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojazhafnkmunüsha|gojazhafnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijazhafmunüsha|gokijazhafmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jazhafmushësha|jazhafmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojazhafnkmushësha|gojazhafnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijazhafmushësha|gokijazhafmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jazhafmurosha|jazhafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojazhafnkmurosha|gojazhafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijazhafmurosha|gokijazhafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jazhaf|jazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:jæzhæf|jæzhæf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojazhaf|hojazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hojæzhæf|hojæzhæf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojazhaf|hohojazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojæzhæf|hohojæzhæf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüjazhaf|nüjazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüjæzhæf|nüjæzhæf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüjazhaf|nünüjazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüjæzhæf|nünüjæzhæf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïjazhaf|nïjazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïjæzhæf|nïjæzhæf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïjazhaf|nïnïjazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïjæzhæf|nïnïjæzhæf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujazhaf|lujazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lujæzhæf|lujæzhæf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujazhaf|lulujazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujæzhæf|lulujæzhæf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijazhaf|lijazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lijæzhæf|lijæzhæf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijazhaf|lilijazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijæzhæf|lilijæzhæf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojazhaf|kojazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kojæzhæf|kojæzhæf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojazhaf|kokojazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojæzhæf|kokojæzhæf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejazhaf|kejazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kejæzhæf|kejæzhæf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejazhaf|kekejazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejæzhæf|kekejæzhæf]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
